title: Senior Teacher - NIT Trichy Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NIT Trichy Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
NIT Trichy Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Trichy Global Group:
NIT Trichy Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy Global Group!
